summary.title: Summary
summary.content: SocratexGamedev is the reusable game-project profile for SocratexPipeline children that need Godot/gamedev command routing, flows, script catalogs, and runtime-quality workflow rules.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.content: Keep game-specific workflow machinery source-owned in SocratexAI instead of copied and forked independently inside every game child project.

child_override_policy.title: Child Override Policy
child_override_policy.content: Children may add project-specific docs, state, plans, context capsules, tools, configs, and explicit overrides. Updates must preserve locally changed managed profile files and report them as overrides instead of overwriting them silently.

project_stack.title: Project Stack
project_stack.content: Designed for game projects, especially Godot/GDScript projects with runtime logs, manual playtest loops, performance diagnostics, and project-owned tool wrappers.
